title: HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER WAITLIST - 211info
text: HOUSING WORKS HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER WAITLIST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers the Housing Choice Voucher/Section 8 program for HUD. The program helps low-income residents afford rental homes and apartments at normal market rates. 405 SW 6th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Income must not exceed 50% of the annual median income based on household size Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm. Waitlist opens for a one week period in early January. Email (541) 923-1018 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 923-1018 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for waitlist application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Subsidized Housing Administrative Organizations Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEQUEST GROUND LEASE PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - PATHWORKS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOUSING WORKS
